title: Pong
description: The classic reimagined. Showcasing deterministic physics and low-latency input handling.

title: Shooter
description: A high-octane twin-stick arena shooter demonstrating manual entity management, collision handling, and a custom particle engine.

title: Triangle
description: A fundamental rendering test displaying a 2D colored triangle using the Redixel rendering pipeline.

title: Triangle 3D
description: A rotating 3D triangle demonstrating mathematical projections, Z-sorting, and 3D transformations.
